tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateDevicePool.createDevicePool
tools.description: Creates a device pool.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateInstanceProfile.createInstanceProfile
tools.description: Creates a profile that can be applied to one or more private fleet device instances.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateNetworkProfile.createNetworkProfile
tools.description: Creates a network profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateProject.createProject
tools.description: Creates a project.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateRemoteAccessSession.createRemoteAccessSession
tools.description: Specifies and starts a remote access session.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateTestGridProject.createTestGridProject
tools.description: Creates a Selenium testing project. Projects are used to track TestGridSession instances.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateTestGridUrl.createTestGridUrl
tools.description: Creates a signed, short-term URL that can be passed to a Selenium RemoteWebDriver constructor.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateUpload.createUpload
tools.description: Uploads an app or test scripts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623CreateVpceConfiguration.createVpceConfiguration
tools.description: Creates a configuration record in Device Farm for your Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteDevicePool.deleteDevicePool
tools.description: Deletes a device pool given the pool ARN. Does not allow deletion of curated pools owned by the system.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteInstanceProfile.deleteInstanceProfile
tools.description: Deletes a profile that can be applied to one or more private device instances.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteNetworkProfile.deleteNetworkProfile
tools.description: Deletes a network profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteProject.deleteProject
tools.description:
Deletes an AWS Device Farm project, given the project ARN.

Deleting this resource does not stop an in-progress run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteRemoteAccessSession.deleteRemoteAccessSession
tools.description: Deletes a completed remote access session and its results.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteRun.deleteRun
tools.description:
Deletes the run, given the run ARN.

Deleting this resource does not stop an in-progress run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteTestGridProject.deleteTestGridProject
tools.description:
Deletes a Selenium testing project and all content generated under it.

You cannot undo this operation.

You cannot delete a project if it has active sessions.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteUpload.deleteUpload
tools.description: Deletes an upload given the upload ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623DeleteVpceConfiguration.deleteVpceConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes a configuration for your Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetAccountSettings.getAccountSettings
tools.description: Returns the number of unmetered iOS or unmetered Android devices that have been purchased by the account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetDevice.getDevice
tools.description: Gets information about a unique device type.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetDeviceInstance.getDeviceInstance
tools.description: Returns information about a device instance that belongs to a private device fleet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetDevicePool.getDevicePool
tools.description: Gets information about a device pool.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetDevicePoolCompatibility.getDevicePoolCompatibility
tools.description: Gets information about compatibility with a device pool.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetInstanceProfile.getInstanceProfile
tools.description: Returns information about the specified instance profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetJob.getJob
tools.description: Gets information about a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetNetworkProfile.getNetworkProfile
tools.description: Returns information about a network profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetOfferingStatus.getOfferingStatus
tools.description: Gets the current status and future status of all offerings purchased by an AWS account. The response indicates how many offerings are currently available and the offerings that will be available in the next period. The API returns a NotEligible error if the user is not permitted to invoke the operation. If you must be able to invoke this operation, contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetProject.getProject
tools.description: Gets information about a project.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetRemoteAccessSession.getRemoteAccessSession
tools.description: Returns a link to a currently running remote access session.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetRun.getRun
tools.description: Gets information about a run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetSuite.getSuite
tools.description: Gets information about a suite.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetTest.getTest
tools.description: Gets information about a test.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetTestGridProject.getTestGridProject
tools.description: Retrieves information about a Selenium testing project.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetTestGridSession.getTestGridSession
tools.description:
A session is an instance of a browser created through a RemoteWebDriver with the URL from CreateTestGridUrlResult$url. You can use the following to look up sessions:

  • The session ARN (GetTestGridSessionRequest$sessionArn).

  • The project ARN and a session ID (GetTestGridSessionRequest$projectArn and GetTestGridSessionRequest$sessionId).

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetUpload.getUpload
tools.description: Gets information about an upload.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623GetVpceConfiguration.getVpceConfiguration
tools.description: Returns information about the configuration settings for your Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623InstallToRemoteAccessSession.installToRemoteAccessSession
tools.description: Installs an application to the device in a remote access session. For Android applications, the file must be in .apk format. For iOS applications, the file must be in .ipa format.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListArtifacts.listArtifacts
tools.description: Gets information about artifacts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListDeviceInstances.listDeviceInstances
tools.description: Returns information about the private device instances associated with one or more AWS accounts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListDevicePools.listDevicePools
tools.description: Gets information about device pools.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListDevices.listDevices
tools.description: Gets information about unique device types.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListInstanceProfiles.listInstanceProfiles
tools.description: Returns information about all the instance profiles in an AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListJobs.listJobs
tools.description: Gets information about jobs for a given test run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListNetworkProfiles.listNetworkProfiles
tools.description: Returns the list of available network profiles.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListOfferingPromotions.listOfferingPromotions
tools.description: Returns a list of offering promotions. Each offering promotion record contains the ID and description of the promotion. The API returns a NotEligible error if the caller is not permitted to invoke the operation. Contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com if you must be able to invoke this operation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListOfferings.listOfferings
tools.description: Returns a list of products or offerings that the user can manage through the API. Each offering record indicates the recurring price per unit and the frequency for that offering. The API returns a NotEligible error if the user is not permitted to invoke the operation. If you must be able to invoke this operation, contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListOfferingTransactions.listOfferingTransactions
tools.description: Returns a list of all historical purchases, renewals, and system renewal transactions for an AWS account. The list is paginated and ordered by a descending timestamp (most recent transactions are first). The API returns a NotEligible error if the user is not permitted to invoke the operation. If you must be able to invoke this operation, contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListProjects.listProjects
tools.description: Gets information about projects.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListRemoteAccessSessions.listRemoteAccessSessions
tools.description: Returns a list of all currently running remote access sessions.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListRuns.listRuns
tools.description: Gets information about runs, given an AWS Device Farm project ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListSamples.listSamples
tools.description: Gets information about samples, given an AWS Device Farm job ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListSuites.listSuites
tools.description: Gets information about test suites for a given job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: List the tags for an AWS Device Farm resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTestGridProjects.listTestGridProjects
tools.description: Gets a list of all Selenium testing projects in your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTestGridSessionActions.listTestGridSessionActions
tools.description: Returns a list of the actions taken in a TestGridSession.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTestGridSessionArtifacts.listTestGridSessionArtifacts
tools.description: Retrieves a list of artifacts created during the session.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTestGridSessions.listTestGridSessions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of sessions for a TestGridProject.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListTests.listTests
tools.description: Gets information about tests in a given test suite.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListUniqueProblems.listUniqueProblems
tools.description:
Gets information about unique problems, such as exceptions or crashes.

Unique problems are defined as a single instance of an error across a run, job, or suite. For example, if a call in your application consistently raises an exception (OutOfBoundsException in MyActivity.java:386), ListUniqueProblems returns a single entry instead of many individual entries for that exception.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListUploads.listUploads
tools.description: Gets information about uploads, given an AWS Device Farm project ARN.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ListVpceConfigurations.listVpceConfigurations
tools.description: Returns information about all Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configurations in the AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623PurchaseOffering.purchaseOffering
tools.description: Immediately purchases offerings for an AWS account. Offerings renew with the latest total purchased quantity for an offering, unless the renewal was overridden. The API returns a NotEligible error if the user is not permitted to invoke the operation. If you must be able to invoke this operation, contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623RenewOffering.renewOffering
tools.description: Explicitly sets the quantity of devices to renew for an offering, starting from the effectiveDate of the next period. The API returns a NotEligible error if the user is not permitted to invoke the operation. If you must be able to invoke this operation, contact aws-devicefarm-support@amazon.com.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623ScheduleRun.scheduleRun
tools.description: Schedules a run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623StopJob.stopJob
tools.description: Initiates a stop request for the current job. AWS Device Farm immediately stops the job on the device where tests have not started. You are not billed for this device. On the device where tests have started, setup suite and teardown suite tests run to completion on the device. You are billed for setup, teardown, and any tests that were in progress or already completed.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623StopRemoteAccessSession.stopRemoteAccessSession
tools.description: Ends a specified remote access session.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623StopRun.stopRun
tools.description: Initiates a stop request for the current test run. AWS Device Farm immediately stops the run on devices where tests have not started. You are not billed for these devices. On devices where tests have started executing, setup suite and teardown suite tests run to completion on those devices. You are billed for setup, teardown, and any tests that were in progress or already completed.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623TagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Associates the specified tags to a resource with the specified resourceArn. If existing tags on a resource are not specified in the request parameters, they are not changed. When a resource is deleted, the tags associated with that resource are also deleted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Deletes the specified tags from a resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateDeviceInstance.updateDeviceInstance
tools.description: Updates information about a private device instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateDevicePool.updateDevicePool
tools.description: Modifies the name, description, and rules in a device pool given the attributes and the pool ARN. Rule updates are all-or-nothing, meaning they can only be updated as a whole (or not at all).

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateInstanceProfile.updateInstanceProfile
tools.description: Updates information about an existing private device instance profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateNetworkProfile.updateNetworkProfile
tools.description: Updates the network profile.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateProject.updateProject
tools.description: Modifies the specified project name, given the project ARN and a new name.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateTestGridProject.updateTestGridProject
tools.description: Change details of a project.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateUpload.updateUpload
tools.description: Updates an uploaded test spec.

tools.name: xAmzTargetDeviceFarm20150623UpdateVpceConfiguration.updateVpceConfiguration
tools.description: Updates information about an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configuration.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
